titleStmt.title: SII 8.713: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 713. (A.R. No. 397 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkopperuñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu 2vatu [ ṛ ṣapa]
tiyati patiṉmuṉṟiṉāl taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟapuliyūr peruṅkavicayaṉ tirukkaḻippālai
ṉ Iraviyum Ivaṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi Ampalattamutu kottalar
m Ivaṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Iva ṉ Iravi tiru
ppālaiuṭaiyāṉum peruṅkavuciyaṉ Iravi tirunaṭṭamā
vaṉ tampi yiravi Ampalattamutum Ivaṉ tampi Iravi śrī mulattā
ṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉaivom kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭai
yāṉukku nāṅkaḷ nilavilaip piramāṇattiṭṭu kuṭuttaparicāvatu
vaṉukku Iṉnāyaṟṟu tiyati Eṭṭunāl viṟṟu vilaittaravu
kuṭuttu Itukku yiṟṟaināḷāl lilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu E
ko nilam Ivvūr piṭākai maturāntakapperiḷamai
muṭṭaiyūṟalāṉa parākkiramacoḻanallūrpāl śrītirucciṟṟampala
vatikkukiḻakku vāṉavaṉmātevivāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu
mutalcatirattu Eṅkaḷnilamāy kaṟāyyāy nirnilaiyumāy
peytinūti Ellai tirucciṟṟampalavatikku kiḻakkum Eṅkaḷ muli
pāttakam peṟṟu Eṅkaḷ pakkal puṟappāṭāy Aṉupavittu varukiṟa ko
llai nācciyār nilattukku teṟkum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
r palavaravai nilattukku meṟkum vācciyaṉ kuṭamuṭaiyāṉ tiru
naṭṭa perumāṉ ttap piramarāyaṉ nilattukku kiḻakkum
m vāṉavaṉmātevi vākkālukku vaṭakkum Iva(r) Icainta yiṉṉāṉke
llaiuḷ Uḷpaṭṭa pottakappaṭi taramiliyāy Eṅkaḷutāy nāṅkaḷ
viṟṟu kuṭutta nilam Iraṇṭaraiye Araimāviṉ ciṉṉattil peruṅka
vuciyaṉ tevaṉ niruttapiriyaṉ Olaippaṭiye Āṟumā nikki nikki nāṅ
kaḷ viṟṟa nilam Iraṇṭe nāṉmāvaraiyiṉ ciṉṉamum Itil Uḷḷa
kuḷamum Āṉaimaṭuvil nirnilaiyum Āka Ittaṉaiyum muṟṟu moḻiviṉṟiye
ṟutiyāka viṟṟukuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu
naṟkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu nūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟikaic
celavaṟa kaiyyile yaṟakkoṇṭu Iṉnilam Iraṇṭe nāṉmāva
raiyum ciṉṉamum kaiyyaṟa viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu Eḻutikkuṭut
teṉ Inta kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku Ivavaṉaivom I
kkācu Iraṇṭāyirat taññūṟume vilaiyāvutākavum vilaiyāvaṇamum
�rumāvaṟutip poruṭcilavolaiyāvutākavum . yituvallatu veṟu
porumāvaṟutip poruṭcilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallātatākavum . paḻa
mpaṭiye pāyunir pāyavum vārunir vāravum yiṟaikku nir yiṟaikkavum
peṟuvatākavum . pot
takappaṭiyāluḷḷa Uṭai
maikaḷum Urimaikaḷum mu
ṟṟu moḻiviṉṟiye ke
patākavum yitukku vanta
kaṭaiyūṟum yiṭaiyūṟum tir
ttu Āḻvippataṟkke Eṅka
ḷ vāḻve yāṭci Iṟaippu
ṇai Āvutākavum . Ippaṭi cam
matittu muṟkuṟitta kācu Iraṇṭāyi
rattañnūṟum Uṭaiyom Uṭaiyapa
ṭi kaiyyile Aṟakkoṇṭum
kuṟittapaṭiyāl vanta nilam Iraṇ
ṭe nāṉmāvaraiyiṉ ciṉṉattai
yum viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu E
ḻutikkuṭuttom Inta kavuṇiyaṉ
civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉuk
ku peruṅkavuciyaṉ tirukkaḻippālaiyu
ṭaiyāṉ yiraviyum Ivaṉe mutukaṇ
ṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi Ampalat
tamutu kottalarkuḻaliyum Ivaṉe mu
tukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ makaṉ peruṅ
kavuciyaṉa yiravi tirukkaḻip pālaiuṭaiyāṉu
m Ivaṉ tampi Iravi tirunaṭṭamāṭiyum
Ivaṉ tampi yiravi Ampalavaṉum Iva
ṉ tampi yiravi śrīmulattaāṉamuṭaiyāṉu
m Ivvaṉaivom . Ippaṭiyāl Ivarka
ḷ paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ karaṇattāṉ puli
yūruṭaiyaāṉ peṟṟāṉ talaikkūttaṉe
ṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi cam
matittu mutukaṇṇāy yiruntu viṟpittum
viṟṟumkuṭutteṉ peruṅkavuciyaṉ tiru
kkaḻippālai Uṭaiyāṉ Iraviyeṉ I
vai Eṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi cam
matittu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Inta peruṅka
viciyaṉ tirunaṭṭamāṭiyeṉ Ivai E
ṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Aṟiveṉ Ākacciyaṉ po
ṉṉampalak kūttaṉ mā
vaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi ca
mmatittu viṟṟukkuṭut
teṉ peruṅ
kavuciyaṉ yira
vi śrīmulattā
ṉamuṭaiyāṉeṉ .
Ivai Uḻaccāṇaṉ E
ṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ vācciyaṉ
kāri tevaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ viṉāyakaṉ capāpati
yeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vāc
ciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ mātevaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ Eṭuttaruḷiyaśrīpā
tameṉ I
Digital edition of SII 8.713 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
